{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|de|---|ja|村社|zh|---|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|de|---|ja|城山|zh|---}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|de|---|ja|天照大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|de|---|ja|豊受大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nirasaki]] [[Category:History of Nirasaki]] [[Category:Sugawara no Michizane]] ==See Also== * ''{{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=Tanabatabime}}'' {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|de|---|ja|郷社|zh|---}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|de|---|ja|延喜式|zh|---}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|de|---|ja|甲斐国志|zh|---}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|de|---|ja|穂坂村|zh|---|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|de|---|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|zh|---|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|de|---|ja|勅旨牧|zh|---|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|de|---|ja|村社|zh|---|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|de|---|ja|城山|zh|---}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|de|---|ja|天照大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|de|---|ja|豊受大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|de|---|ja|郷社|zh|---}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|de|---|ja|延喜式|zh|---}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|de|---|ja|甲斐国志|zh|---}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|de|---|ja|穂坂村|zh|---|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|de|---|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|zh|---|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|de|---|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|zh|---|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|54|N|138|29|41|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}} Hosaka-chō Yanagidaira 3195 |Position = {{coord|35|44|54|N|138|29|41|E|region:JP}} |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|de|---|ja|村社|zh|---|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|de|---|ja|城山|zh|---}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|de|---|ja|天照大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|de|---|ja|豊受大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|de|---|ja|郷社|zh|---}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|de|---|ja|延喜式|zh|---}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|de|---|ja|甲斐国志|zh|---}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|de|---|ja|穂坂村|zh|---|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|de|---|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|zh|---|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|de|---|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|zh|---|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} no {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社|zh|---}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|de|---|ja|村社|zh|---|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日|zh|---}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社|zh|---}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|de|---|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|zh|---}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|zh|---|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|de|---|ja|天照大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|de|---|ja|豊受大神|zh|---}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|de|---|ja|郷社}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|---|ja|式内社}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|de|---|ja|延喜式}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|de|---|ja|甲斐国志}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|de|---|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|de|---|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|de|---|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} Former {{ill|Mura-sha|de|---|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|de|---|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|---|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|de|---|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|de|---|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|de|---|ja|天照大神}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|de|---|ja|豊受大神}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * {{ill|Sugawara {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} * Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} * Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美}} (Kifune-sha) * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|菅原道真}} (Tenjin-sha) {{-}} ==References== {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gōsha in Yamanashi Prefecture]] {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|12=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|12=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|12=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|12=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|12=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|12=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|12=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|12=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|12=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|12=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|12=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|12=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|12=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|12=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|12=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|12=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|12=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|12=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|12=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|12=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|12=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|12=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|12=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|12=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|12=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|12=draft|12=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|12=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|12=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|12=draft}} (Kifune-sha) *
