{{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * revision.comment: 7 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:倭文神社 (韮崎市) up to rev 101989837
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 倭文神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=韮崎市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[韮崎市]]穂坂町宮久保6051 | 緯度度 = 35 |緯度分 = 44 | 緯度秒 = 13.2 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 138 |経度分 = 29 | 経度秒 = 06.1 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-19 |祭神 = [[天羽槌雄神|天羽槌雄命]]
[[天棚機姫神|天棚機姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |例祭 = [[10月10日]] |別名 = 降宮 |地図 = Japan Yamanashi }} '''倭文神社'''（しずりじんじゃ）は、[[山梨県]][[韮崎市]]にある神社である。 ==倭文神社== ===歴史=== [[甲斐国]]の[[延喜式]]内社の20社の1つとして数えられ、[[甲斐国志]]には倭文神社降宮明神と記されている。[[穂坂村|穂坂町]]の総社で宮久保、柳平、三ツ沢三村の[[産土神|産神]]で郷中最も格式の高い神社である。[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011|　倭文神社の詳細｜山梨県神社庁] 境内掲示に、倭文は「しずおり」で、[[麻]]などの[[繊維]]を赤・青などに染めて横糸として織った[[古代]][[織物]]である、と記されている。また、穂坂[[勅旨牧|御牧]]が栄えたころ、御牧の役人の妻や娘などが中心となって織った精巧な織物でこれらの女性たちが[[技芸]]の上達を祈るために天羽槌雄命・天棚機姫命を祀ったのが、この神社の起りである。降宮は「おりみや」で、織宮を意味する。[[江戸時代]]に[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は一二石五斗の[[社領]]を[[寄進]]した、と記されている。 ===祭神=== *[[天羽槌雄神|天羽槌雄命]] *[[天棚機姫神|天棚機姫命]] {{-}} ==本宮倭文神社== {{神社 |名称 = 本宮倭文神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=韮崎市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|54|N|138|29|41|E}}}} |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[韮崎市]]穂坂町柳平3195 |位置 = {{Coord|35|44|54|N|138|29|41|E|region:JP}} |祭神 = [[天羽槌雄神|天羽槌雄命]]
[[天棚機姫神|天棚機姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |例祭 = [[10月10日]] |別名 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Yamanashi|lat_deg=35|lat_min=44|lat_sec=54|lon_deg=138|lon_min=29|lon_sec=41|label={{Jbr|本宮|倭文|神社}}|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|caption=}} }} '''本宮倭文神社'''は、[[山梨県]][[韮崎市]]にある神社である。 ===歴史=== 宮久保に鎮座する倭文神社の山宮である七夕社と上村組にあった神明社、窪村組の貴船社、[[武田氏|武田]]時代の烽火台といわれる[[城山]]の天神社を、貴船社の社地に合併して、[[1959年]]（[[昭和]]34年）、許可を得て本宮倭文神社と改称した神社である。[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007|　倭文神社の詳細｜山梨県神社庁] ===祭神=== *[[天羽槌雄神|天羽槌雄命]]（七夕社） *[[天棚機姫神|天棚機姫命]]（七夕社） *[[天照大神]]（神明社） *[[トヨウケビメ|豊受大神]]（神明社） *[[イザナミ|伊弉冊命]]（貴船社） *[[菅原道真]]（天神社） {{-}} ==出典== {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しすりしんしや}} [[Category:山梨県の神社]] [[Category:山梨県の旧郷社]] [[Category:韮崎市の建築物]] [[Category:韮崎市の歴史]] [[Category:菅原道真]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[倭文神社 (韮崎市)]] to [[Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

{{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) * {{Shrine |Name = '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat={{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|44|13.2|N|138|29|6.1|E}}}} |Address = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Miyakubo 6051 |lat_deg = 35 |lat_min = 44 |lat_sec = 13.2 |N(S) = N |lon_deg = 138 |lon_min = 29 |lon_sec = 06.1 |E(W) = E |map_code = JP-19 |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = Orimiya (降宮) |Map = Japan Yamanashi }} '''Shizuri Jinja''' (倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ==History== The shrine is counted among the twenty {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kai Province|de|Provinz Kai|ja|甲斐国|zh|甲斐国|qq=draft}}, as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|qq=draft}}. In the {{ill|Kai Kokushi|ja|甲斐国志|qq=draft}}, it is recorded as “Shizuri Jinja Orimiya Myōjin.” {{ill|Hosaka Town|ja|穂坂村|lt=Hosaka-chō|lt_ja=穂坂町|qq=draft}} regarded it as its sōja, and it serves as the tutelary deity ({{ill|Ubusuna-no-kami|ja|産土神|1=Ubusunagami|lt=Guardian deity|lt_ja=産神|qq=draft}}) of Miyakubo, Yanagidaira, and Mitsusawa. It is described as the highest-Ranking shrine in that region.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6011　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] On a signboard in the shrine precincts, it is noted that “Shizuri” (倭文) is pronounced “shizuori,” referring to an ancient textile woven with threads of hemp or other fibers dyed in red and blue. It is said that, when the imperial ranch ({{ill|Chokushi-maki|ja|勅旨牧|1=Chokushi Maki|2=ja|3=勅旨牧|4=zh|5=勅旨牧|6=fr|7=Chokushi Maki|8=de|9=Chokushi Maki|lt=Imperial Pasture|qq=draft}}) in Hosaka flourished, wives and daughters of the ranch officials wove fine textiles and prayed for the improvement of their craft by enshrining {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. “Orimiya” (降宮) is pronounced “orimiya” and literally means “weaving shrine.” During the {{ill|Edo period|de|Edo-Zeit|ja|江戸時代|zh|江户时代|qq=draft}}, the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|de|Tokugawa-Shogunat|ja|江戸幕府|zh|江户幕府|qq=draft}} reportedly dedicated 12 koku and 5 to (units of land rice yield) as shrine territory.
===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}} Hosaka-chō Yanagidaira 3195 |Position = {{coord|35|44|54|N|138|29|41|E|region:JP}} |Enshrined = {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Sacred_object = |Shakaku = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|lt=Village shrine|qq=draft}} |Foundation = Unknown |Annual_Festival = {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft}} |Alternate_name = |Map = {{Location map |Japan Yamanashi |lat_deg=35 |lat_min=44 |lat_sec=54 |lon_deg=138 |lon_min=29 |lon_sec=41 |label={{Jbr|Honmiya|Shizuri|Jinja}} |position=bottom |width=200 |float=center |mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg |marksize=20 |caption= }} }} '''Honmiya Shizuri Jinja''' (本宮倭文神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|de|Präfektur Yamanashi|ja|山梨県|zh|山梨县|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nirasaki City|de|Stadt Nirasaki|ja|韮崎市|zh|韮崎市|qq=draft}}. ===History=== This shrine is said to be the Yamamiya (mountain shrine) known as the Tanabata-sha of the Shizuri Jinja that stands in Miyakubo. It also consolidated the Shinmei-sha of the Kamimura-gumi district, the Kifune-sha of the Kubomura-gumi district, and the Tenjin-sha on {{ill|Jōyama|ja|城山|1=Shiroyama|2=ja|3=城山|4=zh|5=城山|qq=draft}} (attributed to the {{ill|Takeda clan|de|Klan Takeda|ja|武田氏|zh|武田氏|qq=draft}} era as a beacon tower). In 1959 (Shōwa 34), with official permission, these were merged at the site of the Kifune-sha and renamed Honmiya Shizuri Jinja.[http://www.yamanashi-jinjacho.or.jp/intro/search/detail/6007　Shizuri Jinja details | Yamanashi Prefectural Shrine Agency] ===Enshrined Deities=== * {{ill|Ame no Hahitsuchi no Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=---|lt_ja=|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt_ja=天羽槌雄命|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|lt=---|lt_ja=天棚機姫命|lt=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|1=Ame no Tanabatahime no Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Tanabata-sha) * {{ill|Amaterasu Ōmikami|ja|天照大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Toyouke-hime|ja|豊受大神|qq=draft}} (Shinmei-sha) * {{ill|Izanami|de|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|zh|伊邪那美|qq=draft}} (Kifune-sha) *
